productDisplayName: Forever New Women Long Black Jacket
description: CompositionBlack flared coat with shawl collar with an outer shell made of 67% wool and 33% nylon, and lining made of 100% polyester in a leapord print design with insert pockets on the sides, and metal bow on chain on the inseam of the collarFittingRegularWash care Dry clean only Cool iron on reverse if necessary Take feminine dressing to the next level with this black flared coat from forever new. The simple flared coat gets a fresh look with the shawl collar and the leapord print lining that makes it a great coat for winter months. Show your chic side with turned up collars and a wide belt in bold red. You can also team this with jeans, white tops and red heels for a really laidback chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in coatsHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
